name: Three-Cheese Zucchini Parmigiana
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a food processor or blender, combine the first five ingredients and blend for 20 seconds. Set aside 2/3 cup of the mixture for topping.
3. Dip each zucchini slice in two egg whites, then coat with crumb mixture. Place on baking sheets prepared with olive-oil spray.
4. Bake for 12-15 minutes.
5. In a separate bowl, mix ricotta, remaining egg whites, parsley, and salt.
6. Spread half the spaghetti sauce in a 13x9-inch baking pan.
7. Layer 1/3 of zucchini, 1/2 the ricotta mixture, and 1/3 of mozzarella.
8. Repeat layers and top with remaining zucchini, spaghetti sauce, and mozzarella.
9. Sprinkle reserved 2/3 cup crumb mixture over the top.
10. Bake for 45 minutes.
11. Let cool for 10 minutes before cutting into squares and serving.
